$comment: Puglit's PERMANENT agent network. Agents are added here at runtime: when the orchestrator needs a capability no existing agent covers, it GENERATES a new agent definition (role + system prompt + the modules it owns) and appends it here, then commits it to GitHub so every future build inherits it. Build feedback updates an agent's prompt/quality-notes over time.

agents.purpose: Adaptive interview until 90-95% understanding of the concept (vision, users, journeys, data + sources, edge cases). Gates the build: refuses to proceed while coverage is incomplete and states exactly what is still unknown.
Real web research on the concept: category references, real data sources/feeds, current APIs/versions, competitors. Output feeds the work plan with cited findings, not guesses.

From discovery + research, design the BESPOKE architecture for THIS concept (its own structure, data model, surfaces, integrations). Selects which registry modules to compose and what must be built fresh. No template.

Generates the project's OWN frontend from scratch per concept (information architecture, navigation pattern, screens, components). The homepage IS the product (public where appropriate). Never a SaaS landing/login unless the concept is a SaaS.
Generates bespoke API/server logic, composing registry modules (auth, payments, crons, db) where they fit and writing fresh logic for the concept's core.
Bespoke schema for the concept (FK-ordered), seeds, ingestion/scraping where the concept needs external data.

Enforces the TodoAstros quality CONCEPTS as rubrics on the bespoke output (not a template): correct auth/gating, pooled+parameterized DB, fire-and-forget crons, persisted funnels, security (RLS/headers/rate-limit), a11y/performance. BLOCKING vs ADVISORY findings.
Real verification: compiles (CI), runs (runtime e2e + headless render), checks the concept's journeys actually work. Feeds failures back to the network and to the modules.
